questions.q: The primary purpose of the United Nations is to?
opts: (A) Promote economic development among its member states
(D) Provide humanitarian aid to disaster-stricken areas
questions.explanation: The United Nations is established with the primary objective of maintaining international peace and security, as stated in the UN Charter.
questions.topic: Origin and Structure of the United Nations

questions.q: The United Nations General Assembly is composed of representatives from?
opts: (A) All member states of the UN
(B) Only permanent members of the Security Council
(D) Countries with a GDP of over $1 trillion
questions.explanation: The UN General Assembly is the primary organ of the United Nations, comprising representatives from all member states.

questions.q: The European Union is an example of a?
questions.explanation: The European Union is a regional economic organization that promotes economic integration among its member states.

questions.q: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) is responsible for promoting?
opts: (B) Economic development among its member states
(D) Financial stability and exchange rate management
questions.explanation: The IMF is an international organization that aims to promote financial stability and exchange rate management among its member states.

questions.q: The United Nations Security Council has a total of?
questions.explanation: The UN Security Council has a total of 10 non-permanent members, who serve for a term of two years, and 5 permanent members.

questions.q: The International Labour Organization (ILO) is responsible for promoting?
opts: (B) Economic development among its member states
questions.explanation: The ILO is an international organization that aims to promote social justice and labor rights among its member states.

questions.q: The World Health Organization (WHO) is responsible for promoting?
opts: (B) Economic development among its member states
questions.explanation: The WHO is an international organization that aims to promote global health and well-being among its member states.

questions.q: The European Court of Justice is a part of?
questions.explanation: The European Court of Justice is the highest court in the European Union, responsible for interpreting EU law.

questions.q: The International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO) is responsible for promoting?
opts: (B) Economic development among its member states
questions.explanation: The ICAO is an international organization that aims to promote safe and efficient air travel among its member states.

questions.q: The United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) is responsible for promoting?
opts: (B) Economic development among its member states
questions.explanation: The UNDP is an international organization that aims to promote sustainable development and poverty reduction among its member states.

questions.q: The World Trade Organization (WTO) is responsible for promoting?
opts: (B) Economic development among its member states
questions.explanation: The WTO is an international organization that aims to promote free and fair trade among its member states.

questions.q: The International Committee of the Red Cross (ICRC) is responsible for promoting?
opts: (B) Economic development among its member states
questions.explanation: The ICRC is an international organization that aims to promote humanitarian law and protection among its member states.

questions.q: The United Nations Children's Fund (UNICEF) is responsible for promoting?
opts: (B) Economic development among its member states
questions.explanation: The UNICEF is an international organization that aims to promote children's welfare and well-being among its member states.

questions.q: The International Fund for Agricultural Development (IFAD) is responsible for promoting?
opts: (B) Economic development among its member states
questions.explanation: The IFAD is an international organization that aims to promote rural development and agriculture among its member states.

questions.q: The United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees (UNHCR) is responsible for promoting?
opts: (B) Economic development among its member states
questions.explanation: The UNHCR is an international organization that aims to promote refugee protection and assistance among its member states.

questions.q: The International Maritime Organization (IMO) is responsible for promoting?
opts: (B) Economic development among its member states
questions.explanation: The IMO is an international organization that aims to promote safe and efficient shipping among its member states.

questions.q: The United Nations Environment Programme (UNEP) is responsible for promoting?
opts: (B) Economic development among its member states
questions.explanation: The UNEP is an international organization that aims to promote environmental protection and sustainability among its member states.

questions.q: The International Labour Organization (ILO) has?
questions.explanation: The ILO is an international organization that has 193 member states.

questions.q: The United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) has?
questions.explanation: The UNDP is an international organization that has a budget of $10 billion.

questions.q: The World Health Organization (WHO) has?
questions.explanation: The WHO is an international organization that has 194 member states.
